items.caption: A vintage movie poster for "a guide for the married man." it features a collage of yellow and white panels with various scenes and text. the poster is designed to advertise the film, which is a comedy about marriage and infidelity. the text on the poster includes the title of the movie, the names of the actors, and the director. the poster also includes a tagline that reads, "fourteen famous swingers give you the do's and don't's for the man with a roving eye and the urge to stray!" this suggests that the film provides advice on how to navigate the complexities of marriage and extramarital affairs. the poster is colorful and eye-catching, with a mix of humor and satire.
